top.name: Spell Prism
top.rules_text: Create a Prism on a tile within 2 (8 HP). When a spell passes through its line of sight it splits: resolve once on the original target and once on the nearest enemy within 2 of the Prism.

bottom.name: Charged Conduit
bottom.rules_text: Imbue a tile: the next spell cast from this tile gains +2 damage per charge you have, then consumes all charge.

upgrades.description: Prism is sturdier and reaches further. Conduit converts harder.

changes.value: Create a Prism within 2 (12 HP). Spells passing through it split to the nearest enemy within 3.
Imbue a tile: the next spell cast from it gains +3 damage per charge, then consumes all charge.

upgrades.description: Refracting Prism: the split copy deals full damage.

changes.value: Create a Prism within 2 (12 HP). Spells passing through it copy at full damage to the nearest enemy within 3.

upgrades.description: Overcharged Conduit: keep half your charge instead of consuming all.

changes.value: Imbue a tile: the next spell from it gains +3 per charge, then consumes half your charge (round up).

upgrades.description: Hall of Mirrors: split to the 2 nearest enemies.

changes.value: Create a Prism within 2 (12 HP). Spells passing through copy at full damage to the 2 nearest enemies within 3.

upgrades.description: Resonant Conduit: the empowered spell also banks charge equal to half spent.

changes.value: Imbue a tile: next spell from it gains +3 per charge, consumes half (round up), then refunds half of that.

upgrades.description: Kaleidoscope: an indestructible prism that splits to all nearby enemies.

changes.value: Create a Prism within 2 (20 HP). Spells passing through copy at full damage to ALL enemies within 3.

upgrades.description: Singular Conduit: massive payoff with no net charge loss.

changes.value: Imbue a tile: next spell from it gains +4 per charge, consumes half your charge, then refunds all of that.
